text:
Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of devel/clewn,
>
> Please note that PR ports/139471 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/139471
>
>   
I completely agree with the submitted patch.
I like it be included in the next revision of  devel/clewn

Thank you
